metadata.title: CodeContextBench Selected Benchmark Tasks (SDLC Suite Reorganization)
metadata.migration_source: migration_map.json (157 mapped tasks across 8 SDLC suites)

methodology.description: Tasks reorganized from 17 legacy suites into 8 SDLC-phase suites. Each task retains its original scoring and metadata; only the suite assignment and task_dir are updated to reflect the new SDLC taxonomy. Tasks with status 'archived' or 'retired' in migration_map.json are excluded.

suite_descriptions.ccb_understand: Codebase comprehension, Q&A, onboarding, knowledge discovery
suite_descriptions.ccb_design: Architecture analysis, dependency mapping, cross-repo reasoning
suite_descriptions.ccb_fix: Bug fixes, SWE-bench Pro patches, multi-team ownership fixes
suite_descriptions.ccb_test: Code review, test writing, performance testing, search tasks
suite_descriptions.ccb_document: Documentation generation (API, architecture, migration, K8s packages)
suite_descriptions.ccb_secure: Security vulnerability triage, governance compliance, access control
suite_descriptions.ccb_debug: Investigation, debugging, fault localization, regression hunting

Role-based write access constraint: agent has read access to core libs but write only to django/forms/.
CVE triage in large C codebase requires searching for SOCKS5-related code across multiple files
CVE triage in large C++ proxy codebase requires navigating HTTP/2 connection management across many source files
CVE triage in Go stdlib http2 package requires understanding goroutine lifecycle and HTTP/2 stream management
Reachability analysis requires tracing call paths from entry points through proxy handlers using MCP find_references
UNREACHABLE vulnerability calibration task - agent must identify admin-only endpoint not exposed to external traffic. Requires understanding Envoy's dual-interface architecture (admin vs data plane).

Java reachability analysis - trace SCRAM authentication nonce validation path from network input to vulnerable function. Requires understanding SASL authentication flow and state machine. Exploitable in plaintext deployments, mitigated by TLS.

Transitive dependency vulnerability analysis (AFFECTED case) - trace CVE-2024-45337 through wish -> gliderlabs/ssh -> golang.org/x/crypto chain. Agent must prove wish IS affected by showing PublicKeyAuth usage path. Requires multi-repo reasoning and go.mod dependency tracking.

Transitive dependency vulnerability analysis (NOT AFFECTED case) - analyze CVE-2023-39325 in grpcurl -> grpc-go -> golang.org/x/net chain. Agent must prove grpcurl is NOT affected despite having vulnerable x/net version because it uses HTTP/2 client (Transport) not server (Server.ServeConn). Harder than sec-transitive-001 - requires proving a negative by distinguishing client vs server code paths.
